caption: The video captures a scene of a live performance or presentation in front of an audience. A woman with short gray hair, wearing glasses, a teal sweater, and a colorful scarf stands on stage holding a book or booklet, appearing to read or speak. Beside her, a man with long dark hair tied back is playing a harmonica into a microphone while holding a piece of paper in his other hand. He is dressed in a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate designs. The audience, visible in the foreground, is attentively watching the performers. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background, suggesting a cozy and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the organization or event name.
